title: nephelium havilandii
intro: Nephelium havilandii, also known as the Rambai tree or Nephelium fruit tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The Rambai tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, due to the presence of flavonoids and tannins in its fruit and leaves. The health benefits of Nephelium havilandii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, prevent diabetes, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Nephelium havilandii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
